arts.ttl: My son trained with Manchester United's first-team - Bruno Fernandes showed a touch of class
arts.sum: Jacob Devaney's father, Martin, has lifted the lid on how his son found the opportunity to train with Man United's most senior figures earlier this year.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Jadon Sancho sends United message as Alan Shearer defends criticism of star
arts.sum: Saturday's victory away to Southampton helped Manchester United climb the Premier League table but there has been plenty of off-field noise around Erik ten Hag's team

arts.ttl: Angel Gomes told he could 'play for Man City tomorrow' but warned against Man Utd return
arts.sum: Nicky Butt feels former Manchester United academy Angel Gomes is good enough to play for Europe's top clubs, but a return to his old club wouldn't suit him right now

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs. Barnsley: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Tuesday's EFL Cup clash between Man Utd and Barnsley, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes comment speaks volumes on how Man Utd squad feel about Jadon Sancho
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho's loan deal features an obligation to buy for £25m next summer and he has already made a fast impression after setting up Christopher Nkunku's winner for Chelsea against Bournemouth

arts.ttl: Man United injury list for Barnsley tie: Will De Ligt, Martinez feature?
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up Manchester United's injury and suspension news ahead of their EFL Cup tie with Barnsley.

arts.ttl: Barcelona wonderkid REJECTED Man Utd summer move
arts.sum: Faye’s agent, Andy Bara, has now confirmed that Man Utd wanted to sign his client this summer. The 20-year-old was linked with a Barcelona exit throughout the entire summer transfer window, with Arsenal, Chelsea, Tottenham Hotspur, Bayern Munich, Bayer Leverkusen and Man Utd among the clubs monitoring his situation at Camp Nou.
